task_completion.description: Verify that Oracle Analytics Desktop is open and the 'Sample Order Lines' dataset is loaded.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Oracle Analytics Desktop interface is visible with 'Sample Order Lines' shown in the Data Panel or dataset list.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Radar Line chart visualization has been added to the canvas.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A radar/spider chart is visible on the main canvas, and the visualization type is set to 'Radar Line' in the properties or grammar panel.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Order Date' (Month) is used for the Angle of the radar chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the visualization grammar/properties panel, 'Order Date' (specifically the Month level) is placed in the 'Angle' or equivalent axis field.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Sales' is used for the Radius of the radar chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the visualization grammar/properties panel, the 'Sales' column is placed in the 'Radius' or equivalent value field.

task_completion.description: Verify that 'Product Category' is used for the Color series of the radar chart.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the visualization grammar/properties panel, 'Product Category' is placed in the 'Color' field, and the chart legend displays product categories.

task_completion.description: Verify that the workbook is saved as 'Seasonality_Analysis' in the default Documents folder.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog showing the filename 'Seasonality_Analysis' in the Documents folder (C:\Users\Docker\Documents), or the application title bar showing 'Seasonality_Analysis' after saving.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Oracle Analytics Desktop GUI to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Oracle Analytics Desktop application windows, menus, and drag-and-drop features, not terminal commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the chart is generated natively by the software and not mocked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The chart appears within the Oracle Analytics Desktop canvas with native UI elements, selection handles, or tooltips, rather than an opened image file.

integrity.description: Verify the file was saved using the application's interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The native save dialog of Oracle Analytics Desktop or Windows is visible, rather than a terminal command creating or renaming files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Oracle Analytics Desktop saves workbooks with a .dva extension (Seasonality_Analysis.dva) in the default Documents folder (C:\Users\Docker\Documents). The application natively supports 'radar' visualizations. Note: The task description asks to use the 'Revenue' column, but the provided dataset actually contains a 'Sales' column instead. The agent should use the 'Sales' column for the Radius.
